mapper.sql:
select a.user_id as userId, max(a.login_name) as loginName, coalesce( max(case when a.star_number is not null and a.star_number != '' then a.star_number end), max(case when a.login_name like 'zsxq_%' then substring(a.login_name, 6) end) ) as starNumber, sum(case when a.event_type = 'SESSION_KICKOUT' then 1 else 0 end) as kickoutCount, sum(case when a.event_type = 'LOGIN_SUCCESS' then 1 else 0 end) as loginSuccessCount, count(distinct case when a.device_id is not null and a.device_id != '' then a.device_id end) as deviceCount, count(distinct case when a.ip is not null and a.ip != '' and a.ip != '0.0.0.0' then a.ip end) as ipCount, max(case when a.event_type = 'SESSION_KICKOUT' then a.create_time end) as lastKickoutTime, max(case when a.event_type in ('LOGIN_SUCCESS', 'LOGIN_FAIL', 'SESSION_KICKOUT', 'LOGOUT') then a.create_time end) as lastActiveTime, max(case when u.forbid_until is not null and u.forbid_until > now() then 1 else 0 end) as forbidden, max(u.forbid_until) as forbidUntil, max(u.forbid_reason) as forbidReason from user_login_audit a left join user u on u.id = a.user_id where a.create_time >= date_sub(now(), interval #{req.recentDays} day)
and a.login_name like concat('%', #{req.loginName}, '%')
group by a.user_id, a.login_name
